initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    cd.cd_education_status,
    cd.cd_occupation,
    SUM(ss.ss_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    store_sales ss
    JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    JOIN customer c ON ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
    JOIN customer_demographics cd ON c.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
WHERE 
    d.d_year = 2001
GROUP BY 
    cd.cd_education_status,
    cd.cd_occupation
ORDER BY 
    cd.cd_education_status,
    cd.cd_occupation
LIMIT 100
initial_candidates.exec_error:
Binder Error: Table "cd" does not have a column named "cd_occupation"

Candidate bindings: : "cd_education_status"
